description: The group appears unreliable. Most, if not all, of its alleged victims cannot be verified and appear to be randomly selected organizations. WE HAVE DECIDED TO REMOVE ENTRIES FOR THIS GROUP
name: 0apt

techniques.technique_details: Exploitation of internet-facing applications (focus on firewalls and VPNs).
Direct system calls to bypass EDRs based on API hooks.
Creation of fake services on Linux systems (systemd).
techniques.technique_name: Create or Modify System Process: Systemd Service

techniques.technique_details: The 0apt payload contains "useless math" loops to delay sandbox analysis.
Use of custom tools that mimic legitimate monitoring traffic.
Sending data via HTTPS tunnels to legitimate AWS S3 instances.
techniques.technique_name: Exfiltration Over Web Service: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
